Nf3 e6 |eco= |parent=[[../|Open Sicilian]] |responses= | }} = Sicilian with 2...e6 = This is an older continuation of the Sicilian. Black plays 2...e6, opening up the bishop and preparing d5 and recapture with a pawn. This can transpose into many other Sicilian lines with d6 and/or Nc6. Many variations from this position include the Kan, Scheveningen, and Taimanov. : ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. '''1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 e6'''
